channel.title: Georgio Bassil on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Georgio Bassil on LMI

item.title: Elimination Of Tar In Biomass Gasification Process: Liquid-Liquidequilibrium Of Ternary Systems Water Plus Solvent (P-Xylene And Methylhexadecanoate) Plus Model Molecules Of Tar (Thiophene, Pyridine,Naphthalene, Phenathrene, And Anthracene)

Tar Removal From Biosyngas In The Biomass Gasification Process. (Liquidplus Liquid) Equilibrium Water Plus Solvent (Paraxylene And Methylhexadecanoate) Plus Model Molecules Of Tar (Benzene, Toluene, Phenol)
